headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: Subcontractor  consents  to  be  joined  and,  upon  Contractor's  request  shall  join  or  shall  consolidate  any  pending arbitration proceeding between Contractor and Subcontractor with, any arbitration proceeding between Owner and Contractor or Contractor and any other subcontractor or third party that, in whole or in part, arises out of or relates to the Subcontract or the Subcontract Work. However, if any lawsuit or lawsuits between the Owner and Contractor or the Contractor and any other subcontractor or third party involve, arise out of or relate to the Subcontract Work or  the  Subcontract,  Subcontractor  agrees  to  waive  its  right  to  arbitrate  any  Dispute  with  Contractor,  and  upon Contractor's request Subcontractor shall join in any such lawsuit or lawsuits.
